payload.notes: Adds guarded execution retry and PR retry recovery paths for Needs Attention tasks.
payload.summary: Implement US-067 Needs Attention recovery action in Symphony Web UI

payload.notes: E08 Symphony Web UI Controller Needs Attention recovery slice.
payload.title: Needs Attention Recovery Action

payload.evidence: Implemented guarded Needs Attention recovery: backend recovery_action metadata, POST /api/tasks/<story-id>/recover execution retry, POST /api/runs/<run-id>/pr-retry PR retry, React retry controls, and Playwright coverage. Validation: harness-cli story verify US-067; cargo test -p harness-symphony web -- --nocapture; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run build; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run e2e; cargo fmt --check; git diff --check; cargo test --workspace; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run desktop:smoke.

payload.actions_taken: ["read Harness docs and story packet","implemented backend recovery eligibility and routes","added React retry controls","added Rust and Playwright tests","ran release validation","updated story evidence"]
payload.decisions_made: ["kept recovery eligibility backend-owned","split execution retry from PR retry","preserved old failed run evidence instead of rewriting run state","kept scope to existing run_state schema"]
payload.errors: ["initial npm build failed before npm ci restored isolated dependencies","initial web tests exposed recovery metadata needed to degrade when Harness DB fixtures are absent","initial inherited HARNESS_RUN_ID test run polluted the changeset and was regenerated cleanly"]
payload.harness_friction: Test processes inherit HARNESS_RUN_ID in Symphony worktrees, so Harness CLI unit tests can write fixture operations into the run changeset unless the changeset is regenerated after validation.
payload.notes: Validation passed: harness-cli story verify US-067; cargo test -p harness-symphony web -- --nocapture; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run build; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run e2e; cargo fmt --check; git diff --check; cargo test --workspace; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run desktop:smoke.
payload.task_summary: Completed US-067 Needs Attention recovery action
